# FOnline ThirdParty pruning notes

Upstream: Effekseer 1.80.5, tag `1805`, commit
`332525b2086e4c97f0cdbdd6c2f2b07e26f754d2`.

This vendored copy contains only the CPU simulation runtime used by FOnline.
When updating from upstream, retain `Dev/Cpp/Effekseer/`, `LICENSE`, and
`README.md`, then remove the paths below again.

Removed paths:
- `.github/`
- `cmake/`
- `Dev/Cpp/3rdParty/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EditorCommon/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerMaterial/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerMaterialEditor/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerRendererCommon/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerRendererDX9/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerRendererDX11/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerRendererDX12/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerRendererGL/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerRendererLLGI/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerRendererMetal/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerRendererVulkan/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerRendererWebGPU/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerSoundAL/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerSoundDSound/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerSoundOSMixer/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerSoundXAudio2/`
- `Dev/Cpp/EffekseerToolRuntime/`
- `Dev/Cpp/Examples/`
- `Dev/Cpp/IPC/`
- `Dev/Cpp/TakeScreenshots/`
- `Dev/Cpp/Test/`
- `Dev/Cpp/TestRuntimeFramework/`
- `Dev/Cpp/Viewer/`
- `Docker/`
- `Downloads/`
- `Examples/`
- `Memo/`
- `Release/`
- `Resource/`
- `ResourceData/`
- `Script/`
- `TestData/`
- `Tool/`
- `docs/`
